zh.Exeter, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Courtenay於大約1331年出生在英國戴文哈可姆時，他的父親Hugh Courtenay III29歲，母親Margaret de Bohun21歲。他於1356年與Emeline Dauney在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1372年9月20日在英國英格蘭戴文享年42歲。

zh-hans.Exeter, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Courtenay于大约1331年出生在英国戴文哈可姆时，他的父亲Hugh Courtenay III29岁，母亲Margaret de Bohun21岁。他于1356年与Emeline Dauney在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1372年9月20日在英国英格兰戴文享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Courtenay was born about 1331, in Haccombe, Devon, England, his father, Hugh Courtenay III, was 29 and his mother, Margaret de Bohun, was 21. He married Emeline Dauney in 1356, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 20 September 1372, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Courtenay est né environ 1331, à Haccombe, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Courtenay III, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Bohun, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Emeline Dauney en 1356, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1372, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Courtenay um 1331 in Haccombe, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Courtenay III 29 und seine Mutter Margaret de Bohun 21. Er hat 1356 in England, United Kingdom Emeline Dauney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 20. September 1372 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Courtenay è nato il circa 1331 nel Haccombe, Devon, England, il suo padre, Hugh Courtenay III, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Bohun, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Emeline Dauney nel 1356, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 20 settembre 1372, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Courtenayが約1331年にイギリスデボンハッコインベで生まれた時，父Hugh Courtenay IIIは29歳，母Margaret de Bohunは21歳であった。1356年にイギリスイギリスでEmeline Dauneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1372年9月20日にイギリスイギリスデボンで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Courtenay(이)가 대략 1331년 영국 데폰 하치브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Courtenay III(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Bohun(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1356년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Emeline Dauney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1372년 9월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Exeter, Devonshire, England: Exeter, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Courtenay nasceu aproximadamente 1331, em Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Courtenay III, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Bohun, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Emeline Dauney em 1356, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1372, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Courtenay родился около 1331 г. в местности хаккомб, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Courtenay III было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Bohun, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Emeline Dauney в 1356 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 20 сентября 1372 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Courtenay nació aproximadamente 1331, en Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Courtenay III, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret de Bohun, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Emeline Dauney en 1356, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1372, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años.
